title: CobblemonSUCA
description: Fun modpack for the cobblemon mod!
body:
# A fun modpack to **boost** the avarage cobblemon experience!
This instance includes mods like:
- **Cobblemon** and a lot of addons
- QOL mods
- mods featuring structures
- some Resource pack to have a better experience!
- And so much more!

We would like to point out that this modpack was made for a server up to 4 people and is highly recommended to change the mods config for the best experience!
## We hope you'll have fun playing this modpack and we wish you a nice adventure with your favorite cobblemon!
### next updates will feature better improvement in gamplay.
